Transcrição Completa: 10 Redoing Thumbnails

 

[00:00] Hey, what's going on guys? So, I'm going to teach you how to pitch in the perfect cold video redoing somebody's YouTube thumbnails and general YouTube optimization.

 

[00:10] So, there's two different things I want you to remember. Number one, you can easily outsource to graphic designers who can do the thumbnails for you. It'll likely be less than $50 per thumbnail, if not even less, like 10 bucks a thumbnail.

 

[00:24] So, for example, if somebody has 10 videos and it cost you 10 bucks a thumbnail, you're going to pay a graphic designer a hundred bucks depending on the country that you outsource to.

 

[00:34] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Cálculo de Custos de Thumbnails

 

NÚMEROS: $10-$50 por thumbnail, 10 videos = $100, 20 videos = $200-$400

 

VISUAL: Exemplo de estrutura de precificação, cálculos matemáticos simples mostrando margem de lucro, custos operacionais e impostos destacados

 

[00:36] Let's say that it's $20 per thumbnail and the person has 10 videos or 20 videos. It'd be $200 to $400, right? So, you just want to make sure that you're charging whatever you want to make as a margin on top of that.

 

[00:48] Of course, including your operating costs, your expenses, and your taxes you got to pull out from that. But to be clear, when you're pitching this kind of service, it's so simple to do because it's just you middlemaning for somebody else who just isn't making perfect cold video pitches and landing clients and getting that middleman money like you are.

 

[01:09] So, to be clear, YouTube optimization is also relatively simple, especially nowadays. There's a great tool uh that I like to use. It's called tubebuddy.com. So, tubuddy.com.

 

[01:22] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: TubeBuddy Pricing Structure

 

NÚMEROS: $9/mês (plano básico), $19/mês (múltiplas contas), $49/mês (plano premium)

 

VISUAL: Interface do site TubeBuddy.com, tabela de preços com três tiers de planos, comparação de features entre planos

 

[01:24] Uh I can't remember how much is that. I think it's like nine bucks a month or something like that. I'll check. Yeah, nine bucks a month is what I pay for it. And if you have like more accounts that you're using or something like that, it's 19 bucks a month or 49 bucks a month.

 

[01:38] So anyway, TubeBuddy does a bunch of cool stuff on YouTube, what you do, you would authorize it with whatever YouTube account that you are going to be running.

 

[01:47] So let's say that I'm pitching myself and I go to my YouTube page here. As an example, I would need if I sold myself to log into this or I would need to get on a Zoom call and have this person log into their Google YouTube account uh in order to link TubeBuddy and YouTube together.

 

[02:08] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: TubeBuddy Features Dashboard

 

NÚMEROS: Keywords, tags, descrições e headlines otimizadas

 

VISUAL: Interface backend do TubeBuddy integrado ao YouTube, painel de recomendações de keywords, seções de otimização de tags, descrições e headlines, métricas de tráfego orgânico

 

[02:10] From there, when you're on the back end, uh, this tool will give you keywords to be able to plug in to get competitive in the search rankings throughout YouTube organically.

 

[02:20] So, as an example, it'll give you tag recommendations. It'll give you description recommendations. It'll give you headline recommendations, and it'll just do a bunch of cool stuff to tell you what you're likely doing wrong in order to get more organic traffic.

 

[02:34] I like to sell these as a pair. You could obviously sell one or the other. This is a great service that is a transactional service that leads to recurring revenue because it builds trust.

 

[02:45] And in addition to that, it's so simple to just make some middleman money on this. Um, you would just be managing the relationships to your clients and then managing, of course, the relationships to your contractors that are executing this or your people in house.

 

[03:00] If you just want to monetize all the skills you already have a little more, uh, go to somebody's YouTube channel, get on their video page. I like to sort by popularity to see if some of their most popular videos actually have thumbnails or not.

 

[03:15] And like I said, I'm going to act like I'm pitching myself here on how this is going to work. Okay, so here we go.

 

[03:21] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Início do Pitch - Análise do Canal

 

NÚMEROS: 4,000 subscribers totais

 

VISUAL: Página do canal do YouTube sendo analisada, vídeos ordenados por popularidade, mix de thumbnails profissionais e não-profissionais visíveis

 

[03:23] Hey, what's going on, Jeremy? you likely have no idea who I am. My my name is also Jeremy. I'm glad you're holding it down for the team. Um, listen, me aside, I want to talk about you generating you more leads, generating you more sales, specifically just by making you positioned better on YouTube.

 

[03:44] I noticed you're putting out a lot of content. You have 4,000 total subscribers, which is great. It looks like your channel's growing. Uh, I went and I looked on SocialBlade and I also saw some channel statistics for you and everything's looking very healthy.

 

[04:00] So, long story short, I really wanted to help you vamp up to the next level, get more organic traction, get more of those video viewers from YouTube disseminating your content at a greater level than it is now.

 

[04:13] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Análise de Thumbnails - Qualidade Inconsistente

 

NÚMEROS: Alguns vídeos com thumbnails profissionais, outros com stills do vídeo

 

VISUAL: Comparação visual lado a lado de thumbnails profissionais vs thumbnails amadoras (stills de vídeo), destaque para inconsistência de qualidade no canal

 

[04:16] I noticed for some of your videos, it looks like you have great thumbnails. As an example, this one looks professionally done. This one looks professionally done. Uh, these two look professionally done. But then there's just these random ones where it looks like you just pulled a still from the video.

 

[04:33] And these videos aren't going to be clicked on as much as the videos that of course have the thumbnails. You know, surprisingly enough, and I'm sure you do this scrolling through YouTube, most people don't actually read the headline or the title of the video.

 

[04:46] They read what's in the thumbnail in order to attract them to click on it or not. And the people who get the most creative with getting people to click win and get the most organic traction and subscriber growth, etc.

 

[05:00] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Crítica Construtiva - Vídeo #1 Ranqueado

 

NÚMEROS: Vídeo #1 em ranking de popularidade

 

VISUAL: Thumbnail de baixa qualidade destacado, possível uso de Canva.com ou clip art, design amador com espaço e elementos genéricos, contraste com padrão de marca do criador

 

[05:02] There's also some existing thumbnails and not not to criticize you here that just aren't up to the level and the standard of brand that you operate at. Like look at this first video here. Maybe you went on to canva.com or I don't know maybe it could have been clip art for all I know and you you know you pulled this space here and this is maybe like a thumbnail generator tool.

 

[05:24] I don't know. But anyway, it's your number one ranked video. So I want to be clear there's so much you can do here that's going to get you more traction, more results just by updating your thumbnails.

 

[05:35] Now, in addition to that, I don't know if you're using this or not, but there's this great tool. It's called tubebuddy.com. So, everything I'm about to talk about, your team could do, you could do if you have time for it.

 

[05:48] I just want to let you know if you want us to do this being uh essentially going through your YouTube, updating all of your thumbnails to make them better. And in addition to that, we'll optimize the videos on the back end.

 

[06:00] So, we'll actually go and we'll update the tags. We'll update the keywords. We'll add different keywords that are searched in high traffic volumes into your description and into your headlines for the title of the videos and we'll just make sure that you get more traffic.

 

[06:15] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Proposta de Serviços Duplos

 

NÚMEROS: $3,000/mês (recorrente), $4,000 (one-time)

 

VISUAL: Tabela de precificação comparativa, dois pacotes de serviço: 1) Otimização de thumbnails, 2) Otimização de vídeos (tags, keywords, descrições, headlines), destaque para desconto recorrente

 

[06:17] So, TubeBuddy is the tool that we use that helps us do that. And long story short, we do two different services once again. We optimize the YouTube thumbnails by making them better and we optimize each video to get it more search traffic.

 

[06:32] So, those two together we do for only 3K per month, okay? because we expect you to be continuing putting out content at a high volume. But maybe you're not, right? Maybe you just need us to come in, clean everything up.

 

[06:46] If you don't do a recurring deal with us, it's $4,000 one time instead of the $3,000 cost. We give people a discount when they work with us ongoing for the content creators that are out there.

 

[06:58] And long story short, Jeremy, I'm going to kind of go into this. So, each one of your videos, we want to raise the standards. We want to raise the quality. We want to make each one look as professional as possible and aligned to your brand to get additional traffic.

 

[07:14] I'm sure that you know this. Attention is the foundation to any business. So, right here on YouTube, that's probably the reason you're posting, to get more views, uh to get more likes, to get more people who are aware of who you are, and more importantly than anything else, to give those people value so they want to buy your stuff.

 

[07:33] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Análise de Descrições - Oportunidade de Conversão

 

NÚMEROS: Múltiplos links nas descrições, canais sociais plugados

 

VISUAL: Seção de descrição de vídeo expandida mostrando links para produtos/serviços, canais sociais, CTAs, oportunidade de aumentar tráfego para conversão

 

[07:35] I was clicking through some of your content here, and I actually noticed in the descriptions of your videos, you're plugging different links, you're plugging your social channels.

 

[07:43] So, long story short, getting you more traffic on these videos would get you more results to the products and the services that you're plugging in the descriptions of these.

 

[07:52] So, I would love to be able to generate this for you. I'd love to be able to help you out. As I said, if you want to do it on a recurring basis, this is a simple onetime $3,000 charge. And if you want us to do it on a uh on a onetime uh just, you know, we'll handle it and we won't do it again. It's $4,000 comparatively.

 

[08:12] So, I'd love to show you some examples of some people we've worked with. I'd love to answer any questions you have. My information here is in the description of the video.

 

[08:21] If you want us to go through, optimize your tags, optimize your description, optimize your headlines, we'd love to do that, too. And we'd love to be your go-to team.

 

[08:30] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO ───────────────────────────── TEXTO: Opção de Consultoria

 

NÚMEROS: $2,000 (one-time fee)

 

VISUAL: Terceira opção de serviço destacada, foco em skill transfer e knowledge transfer, treinamento de equipe existente, accountability incluída

 

[08:32] If in addition to that, you already have a staff, you already have contractors that might be helping you out on YouTube, we would love to skill transfer and knowledge transfer what we know and what we've been able to accomplish into you and your team so you guys could get better results.

 

[08:48] If we do consulting, it's just a onetime $2,000 fee. Uh, and that's because we're going to take what we know and we're going to make sure that operationally you guys know how to do it. We're going to hold your team accountable to do it as well.

 

[09:03] So, if you have any questions, uh, if you want to get started, like I said, my contact information is right here in the description, and we look forward to making your brand at a higher level, operate at a higher standard, and drive you more leads and sales by doing so.

 

[09:18] I'll be talking to you soon, Jeremy. Bye. That's that's how I'd pitch myself on on YouTube optimization. All right, guys. See you in the next video.

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

$10-$50 por thumbnail (custo de outsourcing)

10 vídeos = $100 (a $10/thumbnail)

20 vídeos = $200-$400 (a $20/thumbnail)

TubeBuddy: $9/mês (básico), $19/mês (múltiplas contas), $49/mês (premium)

4,000 subscribers (exemplo do canal analisado)

$3,000/mês (serviço recorrente completo)

$4,000 one-time (serviço único)

$2,000 one-time (consultoria e skill transfer)

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Modelo de middleman: outsourcing de design gráfico com markup

Venda de serviços em par (thumbnails + otimização)

Cold video pitch personalizado analisando canal específico

Análise de vídeos por popularidade para identificar oportunidades

Uso de SocialBlade para validar crescimento do canal

Otimização backend: tags, keywords, descrições, headlines

Skill transfer e knowledge transfer como opção alternativa

Foco em atenção como fundação do negócio

Conversão através de links nas descrições

 

ESTRUTURA:

Framework de análise: Thumbnails profissionais vs amadoras

Processo de pitch em 3 etapas: 1) Análise do canal, 2) Identificação de gaps, 3) Apresentação de solução

Modelo de precificação em 3 tiers: Recorrente, One-time, Consultoria

Sistema de gestão de relacionamentos: Cliente → Você → Contractors

TubeBuddy como ferramenta central de otimização

Metodologia de elevação de padrões de marca

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Custo de produção: $10-$50/thumbnail

Exemplo 10 vídeos: Custo $100-$500, Receita $3,000-$4,000

Exemplo 20 vídeos: Custo $200-$1,000, Receita $3,000-$4,000

Margem bruta: ~85-95% (após custos de thumbnails)

Custo operacional TubeBuddy: $9-$49/mês

Modelo recorrente: $3,000/mês ($36,000/ano)

Modelo transacional: $4,000 one-time

Consultoria: $2,000 one-time (alta margem, sem execução)

Desconto estratégico: $1,000 off para modelo recorrente (25% desconto)

 

DURAÇÃO: ~9:30 minutos FORMATO: Tutorial de pitch + Demonstração ao vivo (role-play de cold video pitch)
